features.title: What is GetPoring?
features.card1.title: Hatch Your Poring Egg
features.card1.body: Choose from 22 unique Poring eggs and raise your very own companion!

features.card3.title: Send to Ragnarok Zero
features.card3.body: Your fully grown Poring becomes a companion pet in ROZ. On the go with GetPoring, at home with ROZ!
